column1: # def-count probe (Rust regression anchor): grove `symbols <dir> --json` must
# report a stable total definition count for a known Rust tree. This is the role
# the retired ../grove-test bed used to play -- ripgrep yielding **3317 defs** as
# a hand-checked regression anchor. That bed is gone; the anchor now rides on
# tokio (this harness's pinned Rust repo) so test + eval + data live in one place.
#   min   = conservative floor: a large async runtime has well over this many defs.
#   exact = `?` until locked. Run `scripts/run-probes.sh` once against the pinned
#           image; it prints the observed count in the `got` column. Replace `?`
#           with that number to turn this floor into a precise +/-0 anchor (a
#           grammar/parser regression then flips it FAIL).
